overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a robed character walking along a torch-lit stone pathway beside a body of water at night. The scene features historic stone architecture with ornate railings, fire bowls, and misty atmosphere, transitioning from an enclosed stairway to open waterfront with views of distant castle structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed stone stairway with fire bowls

events.description: character emerges from enclosed stone stairway into open waterfront area

agents.ego_description: climbing upward through a narrow stone passage illuminated by fire bowls

entered.detail: worn stone steps ascending through a narrow passage
ornate carved stone balustrades lining the staircase
large stone basin with flames providing warm orange light
dark stone arch marking the exit from the enclosed passage

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a narrow, enclosed stone staircase lit by fire bowls. The walls are dark stone, and the path leads upward toward an archway that opens to the outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with wooden gazebo

events.description: wooden gazebo structure becomes visible on the right side overlooking the water

agents.ego_description: walking along the open waterfront path passing fire bowls and approaching a wooden gazebo

entered.detail: flat cobblestone path replacing the stairs
octagonal wooden pavilion with pointed roof overlooking the water
dark calm water reflecting the night sky and distant lights
silhouetted structures visible across the water in the mist
leafy trees lining the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairs, the scene opens to a wide waterfront promenade under a dark blue night sky. A wooden gazebo stands on the right overlooking the calm water, while fire bowls continue to line the path. The character walks steadily along the cobblestone walkway with distant buildings visible across the misty water.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined waterfront path with castle overlook

events.description: large castle structure becomes visible on the hillside to the left

agents.ego_description: continuing along the waterfront path passing trees with views of a distant castle on the left

entered.detail: large gothic castle with multiple towers silhouetted against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The path continues along the water, now lined with trees on the left. A massive castle structure becomes visible on the distant hillside, silhouetted against the cloudy night sky. The character walks past more fire bowls as the misty atmosphere persists.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront approach to wooden building with stairs

events.description: character begins descending stone stairs toward the water level
approaching the entrance of a large wooden building by the water

agents.ego_description: walking down stone stairs near a wooden waterfront building, then continuing along the path to the building entrance

entered.detail: large dark wooden structure with lit windows situated on the water's edge
short flight of stone steps descending toward the water

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a large wooden building situated on the waterfront, descending a short flight of stairs. The water now appears on the left side as the path curves around the structure. The character continues toward the building entrance, passing the final fire bowls along the misty stone walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a confined stone ascent into an expansive, misty waterfront promenade at night. It begins as the character climbs a narrow, enclosed stone staircase illuminated by fire bowls, moving upward toward a brightening archway. As the character emerges from the stairs, the scene opens into a wide cobblestone walkway beside calm water, passing a wooden gazebo under a dark blue sky. The path then extends along the shoreline, shifting past lining trees to reveal a massive castle silhouetted against a cloudy hillside in the distance. Finally, the camera follows the character as they descend a short flight of stairs and curve around the water toward the entrance of a large wooden waterfront building.
